de.uka.ilkd.key.util.joinrule

Class SymbolicExecutionStateWithProgCnt

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.util.Triple<Term,Term,Term>
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.util.joinrule.SymbolicExecutionStateWithProgCnt

  • public class SymbolicExecutionStateWithProgCnt
extends Triple<Term,Term,Term>
    A symbolic execution state with program counter is a triple of a symbolic state in form of a parallel update, a path condition in form of a JavaDL formula, and a program counter in form of a JavaDL formula with non-empty Java Block (and a possible post condition as first, and only, sub term).
    Author:
    Dominic Scheurer

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description

    • Field Detail

      • correspondingNode

        private Node correspondingNode

    • Constructor Detail

      • SymbolicExecutionStateWithProgCnt

        public SymbolicExecutionStateWithProgCnt(Term symbolicState,
                                 Term pathCondition,
                                 Term programCounter)
        Parameters:
        symbolicState - The symbolic state (parallel update).
        pathCondition - The path condition (formula).
        programCounter - The program counter: Formula with non-empty Java block and post condition as only sub term.

      • SymbolicExecutionStateWithProgCnt

        public SymbolicExecutionStateWithProgCnt(Term symbolicState,
                                 Term pathCondition,
                                 Term programCounter,
                                 Node correspondingNode)
        Parameters:
        symbolicState - The symbolic state (parallel update).
        pathCondition - The path condition (formula).
        programCounter - The program counter: Formula with non-empty Java block and post condition as only sub term.
        correspondingNode - The node corresponding to this SE state.

    • Method Detail

      • getSymbolicState

        public Term getSymbolicState()
        Returns:
        The symbolic state.

      • getPathCondition

        public Term getPathCondition()
        Returns:
        The path condition.

      • getProgramCounter

        public Term getProgramCounter()
        Returns:
        The program counter (and post condition).

      • getCorrespondingNode

        public Node getCorrespondingNode()
        Returns:
        The node corresponding to this SE state.

      • setCorrespondingNode

        public void setCorrespondingNode(Node correspondingNode)
        Parameters:
        The - node corresponding to this SE state.

      • toSymbolicExecutionState

        public SymbolicExecutionState toSymbolicExecutionState()
        Returns:
        The corresponding SE state (without the program counter).

      • toString

        public String toString()
        Overrides:
        toString in class Triple<Term,Term,Term>

      • rmN

        private String rmN(String str)
        Removes a trailing newline (\n) char from the given string.
        Parameters:
        str - The string to remove the newline char from.
        Returns:
        The given string with the removed trailing \n char, or the original string if it does not end with an \n.
